resources.string: Tasnalest n tutlayin deg waṭas n tutlayin
Imahilen am iznan i yettṛuḥun u read receipts
Chatforia d platform n tmeslayt amaynut yettwabna i tmeslayt taɣellist u s tutlayin yemgaraden...
Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
Asenked aɣellist d iɣewwaren n tbaḍnit yettwasenfelen sɣur useqdac
Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional.
Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.
Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
Flash screen on incoming call\nBrief bright flash when a call rings.
Brief bright flash when a call rings.
Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
Visual alerts for messages & calls\nShow banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)\nTrigger device vibration with notifications.
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
Ur tezmireḍ ara ad ternuḍ iman-ik d anermid.
Sekcem uḍḍun n tiliɣri neɣ isem n useqdac.
Uḍḍun n tiliɣri neɣ isem n useqdac
We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below.
We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships.
Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.
Opening your email client to send the inquiry…
Please fill in name, email, and message.
Thanks! Your inquiry is on its way. We’ll follow up shortly.
Thanks! We’ll be in touch soon.
By submitting, you agree to our
We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements.
Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads
High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI
Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available
Control translation, smart replies, and ForiaBot auto-responses.
If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked
Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
Free includes basic themes. Upgrade to unlock more themes.
Rnu amerra ukessar iwakken ad tebduḍ…
Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, tasuqilt ɣer 100+ tutlayin, izen n tura, akked usiwel s uɣni/dar.
Deg uselkim? Sken s uẓeṛ n tiliɣri iwakken ad tawiḍ asenfar.
Sekcem isem n unermid yekksen neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri.
That email is already in use.
Please check your information and try again.
One of the values is invalid.
Password must be at least 6 characters.

S tɣuri n umiḍan, teqneḍ ad tawiḍ tilɣa n SMS yellan d tamsenɣurt ɣer tɣawsa n Chatforia (am izen seg yimdanen nniḍen). Taggayt n tiliɣri d data tzemreḍ ad tili. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ deg yifecka.
Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
That username or email is already taken.
Izen n tura d takka n tɣuri
Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, yekka-d yid-s
Kkes-d tɣuri n tutlayin deg yimɣan-ik
Izen n tura d takka n tɣuri
Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara s wudem amezwaru
Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant i kra n yiwen, anda ma tebɣiḍ
Asiwel d usenɣur n tiliɣri d ilelliyen. Iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri n AI d tɣuri n tgejdanit ttawin-d asali.
Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant i kra n yiwen, anda ma tebɣiḍ — s

Awi-d uḍḍun ameɣtu n tiliɣri d usenɣur deg umaḍal s Wi-Fi neɣ data. Tzemreḍ ad tesseqdceḍ tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, izen n tura, akked usiwel s uɣni/dar HD — s yifecka yellan deg usenfar iwakken ad teqqimeḍ teqqneḍ ger tudrin.
Log in from the previous screen
This device has a different encryption key. Restore the correct key to access your messages.
This device is missing your encryption key. Restore it to read encrypted messages.
This device is missing your encryption key. Restore it to read older encrypted messages.
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Minimum 6 isekkilen. Seqdec ufrar yellan d amellal, yellan d uslig.
Used for verification, security, and SMS features where supported.

S tɣuri n umiḍan, teqneḍ ad tawiḍ tilɣa n SMS yellan d tamsenɣurt ɣer tɣawsa n Chatforia (am izen seg yimdanen nniḍen). Taggayt n tiliɣri d data tzemreḍ ad tili. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ deg yifecka.
Deg uselkim? Sken s uẓeṛ n tiliɣri iwakken ad tawiḍ asenfar.
Sken iwakken ad tsaderḍ asenfar neɣ ad teldiḍ deg yiminig-ik.
Your account was created, but secure key setup failed on this device. Please try again.
Tuccḍa deg tuzna. Wali console iwakken ad tẓerḍ tafat.
Your session expired. Please sign in again.
Sign up to start messaging on Chatforia
Please consent to SMS messages or remove the phone number.
I consent to receive SMS messages from Chatforia.
Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant, tsekker, tettwasuqel — s tɣuri tamaynut.
By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Tamawt: Seqdec amiḍan-ik yiwen deg web d tiliɣri. Izen-ik ad qqimen yemtawanen.
Please enter a valid email address.
Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
Account created. Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.
Please verify your email before logging in.
You need to be signed in.
Are you sure you want to cancel your plan immediately? This cannot be undone.
Unable to cancel your plan right now. Please try again or use Manage billing.
Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock AI tools and customization with Premium.
Basic access to Chatforia with core messaging features.
Ad-free access with longer history and forwarding features.
Full access to premium customization, AI tools, and priority support.
Basic access to Chatforia with core messaging features.
Ad-free access with longer history and forwarding features.
Full access to premium customization, AI tools, and priority support.
You’re on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock more features.
Unable to open the billing portal right now.
Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you\'re messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it\'s best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you\'re communicating with before taking any action.

As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.
Medden zemren ad msettafen deg umaḍal...
Platformen am Chatforia d aḥric seg usnifel-agi...
Amek ad tmeslayeḍ s tɣellist deg internet
Medden seqdacen apps n tmeslayt yal ass...
Platformen-agi ttaǧǧan medden ad msettafen deg umaḍal...
Platformen n tmeslayt tuɣalin d yiwet seg ifecka iḥerzen deg tudert n wass-a...
Platformen amaynutin ttaǧǧan asenfar i useqdac...
Acuɣer tesɛa tmeslayt azal meqqren tura
Your recent calls will show up here.
Your recent incoming and outgoing calls.
Room calling only supports video right now.
Video calling is only available for app users right now.
How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.

We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.

Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).

• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.
Tsewḥel {{name}}? Ur tzemreḍ ara ad tawiḍ izen seg-s.
Ur nezmir ara ad nẓer anwa asebqaḍ iwakken ad tsewḥel.
Tsewḥel teccuḍ (backend ur yekkes ara yettawi).
Clear this conversation? This cannot be undone.
Azen izen iwakken ad tebduḍ ad teccerḍit.
Fren aḍris neɣ taxxamt n tccerḍit iwakken ad tebduḍ ad teccerḍit
Kkes tasarut-ik iwakken ad tẓerḍ izen-a
Type a message or attach a file to send.
Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.
Thanks—our team will reply by email.
Tuccḍa deg ubdu n usiwel. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Asiwel ɣer uḍḍun-a s uḍḍun n Chatforia-ik…
Ur nezmir ara ad nebdu tccerḍit. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Tuccḍa deg tukksa n unermid. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Tuccḍa deg usali n inermiden. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
No route available for this contact.
Anermid-a ur yekkes ara ɣer Chatforia.
Tuccḍa deg ubdu n tccerḍit. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Tuccḍa deg usali n alias. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Video calls require a Chatforia account.
Could not import the selected contact.
Could not import the selected contacts.
Pin this person as a favorite contact.
You need to be logged in to create invites.
There are no importable contacts available.
No Chatforia user found with that username. Use the Phone tab to save them by number.
Save any phone number, even if they are not on Chatforia.
Username, contact name, or phone number
Use this tab only for existing Chatforia users.
Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.
You need a Chatforia number before placing phone calls.
Keypad & recents. (If you don’t use PSTN, start calls from a conversation header.)
Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
This backup helps you restore your encrypted messages later. Keep your password somewhere safe.
Create a password-protected backup of your encryption key so you can restore access on a new device.
Your backup password must be at least 6 characters.
Chatforia cannot recover it for you.
The backup is encrypted with the password you choose.
Use this backup later if this device is lost, replaced, or reset.
Your encryption key backup was created successfully.
This will replace your encryption key. Older encrypted messages may not be readable unless you restore your original key.
This will generate a new encryption key for your account. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore your original key.
Encryption reset did not complete correctly on this device.
Key restore did not complete correctly on this device.
Enter the backup password you created when you saved your encryption key.
No backup found. Create one to protect your messages.
No backup found. Please create a backup first.
Encryption reset did not complete correctly on this device.
This device still does not have the correct encryption key.
The restored key does not match this device.
Enter your backup password to restore your encryption key.
Key restore did not complete correctly on this device.
Create a backup before attempting restoration.
Back up your current key first.
Older encrypted messages may become inaccessible unless migration support exists.
Only do this if you understand the risk.
This creates a new encryption key for your account.
Your encryption key was restored successfully.
This browser cannot currently decrypt your encrypted messages. Restore, unlock, or reset your key to continue.
Restore or unlock your encryption key to read encrypted messages on this device.
Reset encryption for this account?\n\nOlder encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
This creates a new encryption key. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
Could not decrypt backup with that password.
Back up, restore, unlock, or reset your encryption key.
Backup is missing a public key
No encrypted backup exists for this account
This account does not currently expose a server public key
Could not reset encryption. Please try again.
Encryption reset did not complete correctly
Could not restore your encryption key. Check your backup and password.
Key restore incomplete or incorrect for this account
Server backup does not match the current account encryption key
Could not unlock your encryption key. Check your passcode and try again.
Used to encrypt the backup file
Enter the passcode used to protect keys on this device.
Create a passcode to protect keys on this device.
Protect keys at rest on this browser
Create a passcode for the new encryption key on this device.
Required before resetting so the new key is protected on this device
The password you created when backing up your key on iPhone
Used to decrypt your keys locally before exporting
This backup does not match your current account key.
This generates a new encryption key for your account. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.
Restore your encrypted chat key from a backup protected by your backup password.
Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.
Could not reserve an eSIM. Please try again.
Best for heavy usage, streaming, and never worrying about data limits.
The ICCID uniquely identifies this eSIM profile.
Install directly on this iPhone, or use the activation details below on another supported device.
Install your eSIM to start using your data pack.

eSIM installation steps can vary by device. Make sure your iPhone is unlocked and eSIM-compatible before installing. If direct install is unavailable, use the activation details above in Settings > Cellular > Add eSIM.
Open your phone’s cellular or mobile data settings.
Choose Add eSIM or Scan QR Code.
Scan this QR code and follow the on-screen steps to finish activation.
This eSIM doesn’t have a valid install link yet.
Ideal for heavier travel usage and streaming.
Maximum data for extended travel and heavy usage.
Perfect for short trips and light browsing.
Great for travel, messaging, maps, and everyday use.
Coverage for your current country or nearby local use.
Unlimited data for travelers who never want to worry about usage.
No QR code is available yet.
Your carrier hasn’t provided a valid install link yet. You can still use the manual activation details below when available.
Keep this QR code private. Anyone with access may be able to install the eSIM.
Tebɣiḍ ad tkekseḍ aɣawas-ik tura? Ur yezmir ara ad yekkes.
Ur nezmir ara ad nkekes aɣawas-ik tura. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen neɣ seqdec Sefrek tɣuri.
Tzemreḍ ad tsefrekeḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ amulteɣ-ik deg asebter n tɣuri, neɣ kkes tura ukessar.
Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka.
Ur nezmir ara ad nsali aɣawas-ik.
Ur nezmir ara ad neldi asebter n tɣuri tura.
Akk imɣanen bḍan tɣawsa-a. Ad k-neɣ-d tamawt mi ara teqqim teqqneḍ ɣer talast.
Ur nezmir ara ad nebdu tɣuri i uɣawas n Twacult. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Ur nezmir ara ad nernu annerna. Ḥrez tellaḍ d bab n twacult yerna ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Tuccḍa deg usali n tɣawsa n twacult.
Azen imayl neɣ aserɣal iwakken ad ternuḍ yiwen ɣer tɣawsa n data n twacult-ik.
Aserɣal-a ad yekkes s kra n wussan. Tzemreḍ melmi ad ternuḍ amaynu.
Tettwaɣen-d ad tkecmeḍ ɣer Tawacult n Chatforia yerna ad tebḍuḍ tɣawsa n data-nsen.
Ur nezmir ara ad k-nernu ɣer twacult-a. Annerna yekkes neɣ yekkes.
Tekkmeḍ ɣer twacult-a. Tura tebḍiḍ tɣawsa n data-nsen.
Iwakken ad ternuḍ Tawacult n Chatforia d tɣawsa n data yemtawanen, bdu aɣawas n Twacult.
Forward incoming calls and texts to your verified phone or email. Outgoing calls/texts can show your Chatforia number.
Upgrade to Plus to use call and SMS forwarding.
This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via
In the app, open Settings to set your preferences
Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.
You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.
Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.
How do I create or recover my account?
Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version.
Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them.
Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata.
Rnu amsawaḍ s ufella i wakken ad tebdu…

You need a Chatforia number before sending SMS.
Please enter one recipient for now.
Azen izen iwakken ad tebduḍ tccerḍit.

Add contacts manually, import them from your phone, or start a new conversation.

Auto-renewable subscription. Payment is charged to your Apple Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscription in your Apple account settings.
By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device.
eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.

eSIM installation steps can vary by device. Make sure your iPhone is unlocked and eSIM-compatible before installing. If direct install is unavailable, use the activation details above in Settings > Cellular > Add eSIM.

Your number may be released in \(days) day\(days == 1 ?
Aselkim-a ur yesɛi ara tasarut-ik tabaɣant. Kkes-d aḥraz yekkesen s ufrar, neɣ sbadu tasekkirt tamaynut (ad tizdiḍ izen n tura-a).
Sekcem ufrar n umiḍan-ik iwakken ad nḥrez tisurutin-ik s tɣellist.
Tasarut tabaɣant ttekka-d ɣer uselkim-a. Tzemreḍ ad tɣeṛḍ izen n zik-a.
Aḥraz ur yesɛi ara tasarut tazayt
Ur yella ara aḥraz yekkesen i tɣawsa-a n umiḍan
Aḥraz n tsarut yekkes-d ✓ Tisurutin ttwasersen deg uselkim
Enter a new name for this device
Anekcum s Apple ur yewjid ara
Device limit reached for the Free plan. Log out on another device or upgrade to Premium to link more devices.
This action requires a Premium plan.
Invalid request. Check your username/email and password.
Please enter a valid email address.
Unable to process request. Please try again in a moment.
Enter the email you used to create your Chatforia account and we\'ll send you a secure link to reset your password.
If an account exists with that email, we\'ve sent a password reset link. It may take a few minutes to arrive. Be sure to check your spam or promotions folder.
Anekcum s Google ur yewjid ara
Ales tuzna n imayl n usenqed
Invalid or missing password reset token.
Invalid or missing token. Please request a new password reset link.
Choose a strong password you don’t use elsewhere.
Your password has been reset successfully
Anekcum s yiwen ur yewjid ara tura. Seqdec username d password.
Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
Camera access is denied. Enable it in Settings.
Camera access is restricted on this device.
Microphone access is denied. Enable it in Settings.
Microphone access is restricted on this device.
Ur yella ara tamedyazt yekkesen deg uselkim-a.
Tasekkirt teccuḍ. Izen ur yuzin ara.
Tawlaft tmeqqer aṭas. Ɛreḍ afaylu amecṭuḥ.
Tuccḍa deg tuzna. Tzemreḍ ad talseḍ tuzna n tqerrabt i teccuḍ.
Tuzna n izen tetteddu s tɣuri tamellalt. Ṛẓem.
Anaw n ufaylu ur yekkes ara.
Upgrade required to use this feature.
Tuccḍa n usenqed. Wali izen-ik yerna ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Talast n uɣawas ilelliyen: tuzɣi awtmat ɣer 1 n wass. Tteddu ɣer 1d.
Aru izen neɣ seddu afaylu iwakken ad tazenḍ.
Talast tafellayt i Premium d 30 n wussan. Tteddu ɣer 30d.
Add a caption, then tap Send

Could not lease that number. It may have just been taken—try another.
Could not protect your number right now.
Free number that may be recycled after inactivity.
Please enter a 3-digit area code (e.g., 415) or leave blank.
Lock this number (weekly add-on, coming soon)
Locking numbers is a Premium feature.
No free numbers are available right now.
No free numbers in our pool for that area code right now.
No available inventory for that area code right now.
No number assigned. Pick one by area code to start texting.
Pick a Chatforia number to use for messaging and communication inside the app.
Keeping your number is a Premium feature.
Keep your number while your Premium subscription is active.
Premium numbers are protected from recycling while your Premium subscription is active.
Release your current number? It may be assigned to someone else.
Your number may be released in {{count}} day. Upgrade to Premium to keep it protected.
Enter a 3-digit area code (US/CA only), or leave blank, then search.
Unable to load phone number status.
Your number {{number}} will be released on {{date}} unless reactivated.
Ldi iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri d tukksa n udellel.
This feature requires a Premium plan.
Visible below and unlockable with Premium.

Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
For media inquiries, reach us at
On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.
Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).
privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).
Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.
Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.
We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.
Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.
Add a recipient above to start…

If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
Store only ciphertext on the server. Disables AI/Translate and moderation previews.
Strict E2EE enabled. AI/Translate will be disabled.
Nḥerzen kan tazwara n taseggit (ur d ara azemz n tlalit-ik). Yettwaseqdec iwakken ad yili usemtawi n Tccerḍit tamaynut amellal.
Free includes basic themes. Upgrade to unlock more themes.
Ḥrez tasarut-ik n tsekkirt iwakken ad tseklesḍ izen-ik ɣef uselkim nniḍen s tɣellist.
Aḥraz n tsekkirt d usemtawi n yibenkan
Azen isiwlen d tuzna n tiliɣri ɣer uḍḍun-ik yekksen neɣ imayl. Isiwlen/tuzna n tiliɣri n yeɣer zemren ad sbanen uḍḍun n Chatforia-ik.
Sekcem uḍḍun n tiliɣri E.164 amellal (e.g., +15551234567).
Sayeḍ n tɣuri ilaq ad yili gar 0 d 23.
Fren yiwen neɣ ugar n taggara (tiliɣri neɣ imayl).
Awi-d data n tiliɣri i Chatforia mi ara tekkes seg Wi-Fi.
Your eSIM is active and ready to manage.
Tamsenɣurin-nsen ad banen deg uɣawas n utteḍfu-ik ma yekka-d s tenneḍda n yimḍeṛṛen (neɣ i yimdanen meṛṛa).
Sireg Ria ad tket ɣef wayen i tebɣiḍ
Mi ara yekkes, Ria ad tseqdec tamsenɣurin-ik n Tccerḍit tamaynut (kan yid-k) iwakken ad teqqim tccerḍit tettemtawi. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ.
Iɣewwaṛen n usiwel n tiliɣri yekksen
Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka am aḥraz, uḍḍunen nniḍen, d yifecka n tabaɣant.
Tuccḍa deg usekles n tsarut (ufrar ur yemtawi ara neɣ afaylu yekkes).
Tasarut-ik tabaɣant ur tteffɣ ara seg uselkim-a. Sekles-d aḥraz yekkesen s ufrar iwakken ad tseklesḍ ɣef uselkim nniḍen.
Tasekkirt tamaynut tesbadu yerna tasarut tazayt tsekles.
Ilaq ad tkecmeḍ iwakken ad tẓerḍ iɣewwaṛen.
Ur yella ara tasarut tabaɣant deg uselkim-a iwakken ad tsekles.
Anwa i tzemreḍ ad tiliḍ tesmtawiḍ?
Imsaganen n 13–17 ad smtawan kan d imsaganen nniḍen n 13–17. Imdanen meqqren ur zmiren ara ad smtawan d imsaganen.
Tebɣiḍ ad tekkes uḍḍun-ik amiran? Tzemreḍ ad tseklesḍ ɣer Chatforia Wireless.
Ur nezmir ara ad neldi asebter n tɣuri. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
Tuccḍa: Ur nezmir ara ad nḥrez iɣewwaṛen
Back up your encryption key so you can restore access to encrypted messages.
Create a secure backup of your encryption key.
Sbadu ufrar iwakken ad tseklesḍ aḥraz-ik:
Sken aḍris amezwaru d tasuqilt s tama
Free includes basic sounds. Upgrade to unlock more tones and ringtones.
I tɣellist, imiḍanen n taseggit 13–17 zmiren kan ad smtawan d imiḍanen nniḍen n 13–17 deg Tccerḍit tamaynut.
Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen — seqdec iɣewwaṛen n Tafukt/Ayur ukessar. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka.
Choose Plus or Premium to unlock more features.
Tuzɣi tawurmit n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ (ussan)
Eǧǧ-it d ilelliyen iwakken ad yekkes yid-s
Azen tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ ɣer imayl
Imayl iwakken ad tawiḍ tilɣa n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ
Yettwaseqdec mi ara tekkes tɣuri n uslu-ik.
Tuccḍa deg usali n tɣuri n uɣewwaṛ
Tɣuri n uɣewwaṛ tesaḍḍa s tɣuri
Tamsenɣurin n uɣewwaṛ seg uḍḍunen n Chatforia-ik ad qqimen deg taggayt n Tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ. Tzemreḍ ad tremdeḍ tasuqilt d tuzna deg iɣewwaṛen yellan.
Seqdec usemtawi s taseggit deg Tccerḍit tamaynut
Mi ara yekkes, neɣra ad nɣer imdanen n taseggit yemtawanen.
To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.

We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
Mmeslay s wudem arussin di tazwara. Rnu Friend mbaɛd ma yella yelha.
Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.
Chat with Ria anytime — separate from random human matching.
Only human-to-human chats can be saved
Sbadu tazwara n leɛmer-ik deg Profile → Age & Random Chat iwakken ad tiliḍ yemtawan d yimdanen.
Mmeslay d yiwen amaynu s tɣawla, neɣ fren ad tmeslayeḍ d Ria.
Waiting for them to accept Add Friend…
support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
Usefru yezmer ad yettwafk ma yella llan tuccḍiwin am udrim i ttusran sin, tuccḍa deg ubill, neɣ ugur n teknikt i yettḥebsen anekcum ɣer imahilen yettwafkan s udrim. Yal asuter yettwasekcem s tḥeqqiq.
Deg Chatforia, nɛeddu ad nfk axeddim n lqaɛda i yal amdan. Tasertit-agi n usefru n udrim tessekna melmi ara yettwafk usefru.
S umata, ur nettak ara usefru i wakud ur nettwasexdem ara, iḥricen n ijerden, neɣ ma ur tettseḥbseḍ ara uqbel n usemmed.
Ijerden ttusran sdat u ttɣellin s usekles amur n wakud. Tzemreḍ ad tesseḥbes deg yal wakud seg iɣewwaren n umiḍan inek neɣ seg platform iɣef t-tzraḍ.
Ma t-tzraḍ seg platformen n wis kraḍ am Apple App Store, ilaq ad tessutreḍ usefru ɣer-sen srid.
No rewrite suggestions came back. Try another tone.
Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. What’s on your mind?
Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today?
Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up?
Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today?
Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat?
Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about?
Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. What’s up?
Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add?
Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off?
Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind?
Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind?

I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.
Reply HELP for assistance or email
Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated
Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.
By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our

Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.
{sound} is a premium sound. Upgrade to preview and use it.
{sound} is a premium sound. Upgrade to unlock premium text tones and ringtones.
You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked. Upgrade to unlock all.
You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked.
Free includes basic sounds. Upgrade to unlock more tones and ringtones.

Ur yella ara inermiden yemtawanen d unadi-ik.
Phone/email entries will be available after you save them as contacts.
Nadi isem, isem n useqdac, neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri
Type a username or phone and press Search.
D acu i tebɣiḍ ad tili deg tɣuri-ik?
Ar 5 n yifayluten. 24h tuzɣi s wudem amezwaru.
Could not complete that action. Please try again.
We’ll try to resolve this instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Issue resolved instantly — no ticket needed.
Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
Message sent. We’ll reply by email.
We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.
Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
You’re responsible for activity on your account.
We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.
support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.
By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.
You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).
Plus removes ads and adds forwarding. Premium unlocks additional themes, message tones, ringtones, AI tools, and the full Chatforia experience.
Log in to your Chatforia account
Sign in or create an account

Auto-renewable subscription. Payment is charged to your Apple Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscription in your Apple account settings.
Ldi iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri d tukksa n udellel.

10 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.

5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported European countries, subject to fair-use and local network availability.

20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported global destinations.

5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported global destinations.
Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported global destinations, subject to fair-use and local network availability.

20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.

Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across your selected country, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
Akemmus n twacult ad yernu neɣ ad yali tɣawsa n data yemtawanen. Tzemreḍ ad ternuḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ imɣanen melmi ma tebɣiḍ.
Yellan s tɣuri n useqdec amellal d talast n tmurt
Yellan d amellal i 3–5 n yimɣanen n tɣuri
Tɣawsa n data yemtawanen i twacult-ik
Rnu akemmus nniḍen melmi ma tebɣiḍ
Akemmus n twacult yebḍa yiwen n ukemmus n data ɣef imiḍanen n Chatforia yemtawanen. Tella-d s tamurt-ik d tɣuri n tmurt.
Yesɛi 80 GB n data yemtawanen — i twacultin i yellan yid-sen yal ass.
Yesɛi 40 GB n data yemtawanen — yellan d amellal i 3–5 n yimɣanen n tɣuri.
Yesɛi 20 GB n data yemtawanen — yellan d amellal i 2–3 n yimdanen n tizwirt.
Bḍu yiwen n ukemmus n data ɣef twacult-ik. Yiwen n ufelluq, ugar n yimiḍanen n Chatforia, tɣuri tamensayt.
Ih. Tzemreḍ ad tsefrekeḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ amulteɣ-ik seg asebter n tɣuri deg usenfar. Ibeddilen ad qqimen ɣef taggara n taggayt n tɣuri tamirant.
Tzemreɣ ad kkesɣ neɣ ad beddleɣ iɣewwaṛen melmi ma tebɣiɣ?
Chatforia Mobile yesseqdac tɣuri tamensayt n eSIM. Tella-d s tamurt-ik d ibenk-ik. Ad tẓerḍ iɣewwaṛen yellan deg tazwara deg usenfar.
Anda ara yekkes akemmus n data n eSIM?
Akemmus n Twacult ad yernu tɣawsa n data yemtawanen ɣef ugar n yimiḍanen n Chatforia. Yiwen n umdan ad yefk tafelluqt, yerna tzemreḍ ad ternuḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ imɣanen d talast i yal aɣerbaz.
Amek ara yekkes akemmus n Twacult?
Ih. Aɣawas Ilelliyen yesɛi uḍḍun n Chatforia, usiwel d tamsenɣurt s udellel. Tzemreḍ ad teqqimeḍ ɣef Ilelliyen akk melmi ma tebɣiḍ, neɣ sali-d iwakken ad tkekseḍ udellel d tɣuri nniḍen.
Aɣawas Ilelliyen yellan d ilelliyen s tidett?

Plus yekkes udellel yerna yesɛi tamsenɣurt n izen ɣer ugar — yellan d amellal i tamsenɣurt n yal ass. Premium yerna tawlaft, yifecka n AI i usali d err, d tallelt tamellalt i yimdanen n tɣuri tafellayt.
Bdu s uɣawas ilelliyen s udellel. Zzi ɣer adellel ilelliyen s Plus, neɣ ldi akk iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri s Premium.
Choose a cleaner, more personal Chatforia experience.
Upgrade to Premium to keep your number protected from recycling.
Yekka-d s tazwara. Tzemreḍ ad tkekseḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ. Ur yella ara aḥraz nniḍen.
Akk iɣewwaṛen, islan, d yifecka n AI.
One-time data packs with clear pricing
Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable
Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.
Taggayt n data tettemtawi s wamek ara tesseqdceḍ Chatforia (asiwel, tamuɣli, tamedyazt, d yisensan nniḍen ɣef tiliɣri-ik).
Smenyif akemmus n data n eSIM
Akemmus n data n eSIM yesra ibenk yellan d eSIM d ilelliyen. Tella-d s yibenkan, uɣawas, d tamurt. Tɣuri d tɣuri ad temtawi s tɣawsa.
Yellan s tɣuri n useqdec amellal d talast n tmurt
Tazwara n eSIM s tɣuri tamaynut
Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.
Tccerḍit tafellayt, isiwlen, tamuɣli, d useqdec n hotspot
Tura n taggayt, isiwlen n VoIP, d yikaramen
Great for trips across supported European countries.
Best for international travel across multiple regions.
Best for staying connected in one country.
Tura imecṭuḥen, tamsenɣurt tamellalt, d yisiwlen n tikkelt
Rnu data tamensayt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes war Wi-Fi. Tɣuri ad temtawi s tamurt-ik d yidrimen.
Fren akemmus n data tamensayt yiwen n tikkelt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes mi ara telliḍ deg tiliɣri.
Chatforia Mobile (akemmus n data n eSIM)
Best for heavy use where supported.
Data n tɣuri tafellayt i useqdec ameqqran
Tazwara n eSIM s tɣuri tamaynut
Akemmus yiwen n tikkelt, war amulteɣ
Tɣuri ad tessusem mi ara tili tɣuri tafellayt
Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.
Bdu tamsenɣurt s ilelliyen. Yellan d amellal ma telliḍ kan tɛreḍ Chatforia.
Ilelliyen yid-s s udellel deg usenfar
Err n AI d tasuqilt tamaynut (useqdec amellal)
Tccerḍit tamaynut 1:1 d tgrawt, akked isiwlen s uɣni d tamuɣli
Izen n tura d yifecka n tabaɣant n tizwirt
Bḍu tawlafin, izen n uslu, d timuɣliwin imecṭuḥen
Akk iɣewwaṛen n tizwirt, war udellel. Yellan d amellal i tamsenɣurt n yal ass d usiwel.
Akk wayen yellan deg Ilelliyen, war udellel
Azen isiwlen d tuzna n tiliɣri ɣer uḍḍun-ik amiran
Tamsenɣurt n izen ɣer 6 n wagguren
Tallelt tamellalt mi ara yekkes wenneɣ
Ḥrez 30% s aseggas — kemmel ɣer unekcum
Ḥrez ugar mi ara tiliḍ s aseggas — akked yifecka n yinit nniḍen, yifecka n AI, d tallelt tamellalt.
Yekka-d s tazwara. Tzemreḍ ad tkekseḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ. Ur yella ara aḥraz nniḍen.
Akk wayen yellan deg Premium s ayyur — akked yifecka n yinit nniḍen
Yekka-d s yiwen n wass n useggwas
Yellan d amellal i yimdanen n tɣuri, imdanen n tɣawsa n yeɣer, d imdanen n tiliɣri
Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active
Ḥrez azal n 30% ɣef tɣuri s ayyur
Tamsenɣurt n Chatforia meṛṛa: yifecka n AI, tawlaft, d tallelt tamellalt.
Yifecka n AI n Premium kan i usali, err n tizwirt, d tizwalin
Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active
Tallelt tamellalt mi ara tebɣiḍ tallelt
Ldi akk tawlafin n yinit n Premium d yifecka n usenfar
Remove distractions and unlock practical communication tools.
Unlock personalization, AI tools, and advanced Chatforia features.
Still syncing. Please try again in a moment.
Fren aɣawas n usenfar, rnu akemmus n data i tman-ik, neɣ bḍu data d twacult-ik — meṛṛa seg yiwen n wemḍiq.
Bdu s uɣawas ilelliyen s udellel. Zzi ɣer adellel ilelliyen s Plus, neɣ ldi akk iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri s Premium.
Rnu tɣawsa n data yemtawanen i twacult-ik yerna sefrek useqdec n yiwen.
Rnu data n tiliɣri tamensayt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes mi ara tekkes seg Wi-Fi.
Azen ɣer uḍḍunen n tiliɣri amiran — mačči kan ɣer yimdanen n usenfar — s AI d waddad yellan. Yellan d amellal ma tebɣiḍ ad tkecmeḍ seg TextFree neɣ TextMe.
Udellel amecṭuḥ ɣef Ilelliyen, asali amellal ɣer Plus, d yifecka n Premium ur yellan ara deg TextNow.
Asenfar amaynu, tɣawsa tamensayt, d tasuqilt yellan deg usenfar deg uɣewwaṛ n usiwel n zik.
Tamsenɣurt tettusbadu ɣef talɣa n tɣawsa yellan d tuzmint yerna tzemreḍ ad temtawi. Tamsenɣurin nniḍen n tuzna n tiliɣri am TextFree neɣ TextMe ttbanen am TextNow.
Chatforia yekka-d s uḍḍun ameɣtu n tiliɣri, tasuqilt tamaynut, d ubrid amellal iwakken ad tiliḍ war udellel.
Choose Plus or Premium to unlock more features.
Tip: you can deep link directly to /video?room=room-name.
Start a 1:1 video call with another user.
Tip: Paste a number and call without saving a contact. We’ll invite non-users by link.
Multi-party video using a shared room name.
Create a room or join an existing one by typing the same name.
Tip: share this name with others, or deep link to
Multi-party video using a shared room name.
Join or create a multi-party room.
Ameskar n uslu n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ
Tuccḍa deg tukksa n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ.
Ur yella ara tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ.
When someone leaves you a voicemail, it will show up here.
Tuccḍa deg usali n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ.
Tira n tamsenɣurt ur tewjed ara.
Tamerkast n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ ur tɣuri ara
Manage your Chatforia mobile data, phone number, eSIM setup, and plan status.
Track your current data usage and remaining balance.
Shared data across your family members.
Sefrek aɣawas n tiliɣri n Chatforia, uḍḍunen, tuzna, d usekles n uḍḍun.
Generate or open your eSIM QR code and follow the activation instructions on your phone.
Your eSIM is ready. You can open the QR code or continue managing your mobile plan.
Install your eSIM to use Chatforia Mobile data on this device.
Data-ik yekkes. Awi-d akemmus amaynu iwakken ad tkemmleḍ useqdec n data n tiliɣri.
Sekles uḍḍun-ik amiran ɣer Chatforia Wireless
Tzemreḍ ad tawiḍ uḍḍun amaynu n Chatforia, neɣ tseklesḍ uḍḍun-ik amiran seg uɣawas nniḍen.
This plan is part of a shared family data pool.
Choose a data pack to activate Chatforia Mobile.
Set up your eSIM first, then choose a data pack when you’re ready.
Uḍḍun n tiliɣri iwakken ad tseklesḍ
Sali-d uḍḍun-ik amiran seg uɣawas nniḍen ɣer Chatforia. Ḥrez imeslayen ad yemtawi d umiḍan-ik n uɣawas iwakken ur yelli ara aḥraz.
Asuter n tsekles yekka-d! Ad k-neɣ-d tilɣa.
Tuccḍa deg usali n yisuturen n tsekles.
Ur yella ara armud n tsekles.
Ṭṭef addad n yisuturen n tsekles n uḍḍun-ik.
Browse eSIM data packs and manage wireless features.
